scope.summary: Classify semantic catalog misses and ORA-31603 as object-not-found, while keeping unprovable reads refused and directing operators to sanctioned discovery tools.
out_of_scope: Admitting raw-SQL views or other dependencies that the semantic read gate cannot prove safe.
Changing operating-level escalation, profile maxima, or the transient driver-error classification work assigned elsewhere.

entry_points.name: oracle_query semantic read admission
entry_points.trace: cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib served_read_gate_ -- --nocapture: 3 passed, including catalog-miss ObjectNotFound text, refusal next steps, and zero caller queries.

entry_points.name: oracle_connection_info structured failure response
entry_points.trace: cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib connection_info_degrades_when_describe_fails -- --nocapture: 1 passed; the nested connection_error carries oracle_list_profiles and a diagnostic next step.

entry_points.name: driver error envelope classification
entry_points.trace: cargo test -p oraclemcp-error --lib -- --nocapture: 20 passed; cargo test -p oraclemcp-db dbms_metadata_missing_object_does_not_fall_back_to_connection_failed -- --nocapture: 1 passed.

limitations: No live Oracle result is claimed; this close records local refusal grammar and driver-message classification behavior.
